deals.name: Glencairn 4-Pack
deals.note: Four glasses instead of the standard two-pack — better value per glass and you're covered for guests.

deals.name: Wild Turkey 101 1.75L Handle
deals.note: Better per-ounce value than the 750ml — buy the handle when you're restocking, not a single bottle.

deals.name: Oliva Serie G Toro 5-Pack
deals.note: The entry to the Oliva family — same DNA as the Serie V at a lower price per stick. Good way to learn the profile before committing to a box.
